section: UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES - Periodic Transaction Report
free_text:
# Periodic Transaction Report — Cover

- **NAME:** Rohit Khanna
- **OFFICE TELEPHONE:** (202) 225-2631
- **[X] Member of the U.S. House of Representatives** — State: CA, District: 17 (File an original and 2 copies)
- **[ ] Officer or Employee** — Employing Office: (blank)
- **Did you purchase any shares that were allocated as a part of an Initial Public Offering?** Yes [ ] / No [X]
- **Initial Report [X] / Amendment [ ]** — Date of Report Being Amended: (blank)
- Stamps: "HAND DELIVERED", "Page 1 of 9" (handwritten 9), "LEGISLATIVE RESOURCE CENTER 2017 JUN 12 AM 9:12, OFFICE OF THE CLERK, U.S. HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES", handwritten initials in (For Official Use Only) area.
- Notice: "A $200 penalty shall be assessed against anyone who files more than 30 days late."

Transaction grid: first row of the blank grid has "Please see the attached" written in the FULL ASSET NAME column; no checkboxes marked, no dates. Greyed example row (JT, Example: Mega Corp. Common Stock, Sale X, 02/05/015, 03/07/15, amount B X) ignored per spec.
